name: OxyGenX Pod Set – BALANCE POD
shortDescription: Balancing OxyGenX pod set for oily, acne-prone skin. 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. Sebum regulation, impurity removal.
description:
The BALANCE POD set is a balancing treatment package developed for the OxyGenX+ treatment device, created for oily, acne-prone skin.

The set contains 6 OxyGenX capsules (pods), 6 primer gels, and 6 serums – sufficient for 6 complete treatments.

During the treatment, the released CO₂ stimulates the skin's natural oxygen production (Bohr effect), while the special active ingredients remove impurities, reduce sebum production, and balance the skin.
metaTitle: OxyGenX BALANCE POD set – balancing treatment package
metaDescription: BALANCE POD set for OxyGenX+ device: 6 capsules + 6 primer gels + 6 serums. For oily, acne-prone skin, sebum regulation. 12.990 Ft.

faq.question: How many treatments does a BALANCE POD set last?
faq.answer: One set is sufficient for 6 complete treatments. It contains 6 capsules, 6 primer gels, and 6 serums.

faq.question: What skin type is the BALANCE POD recommended for?
faq.answer: The BALANCE POD is specifically recommended for oily, acne-prone skin. It helps regulate sebum production, removes impurities, and balances the skin.

faq.question: Which device is the BALANCE POD set compatible with?
faq.answer: The BALANCE POD set is designed for the OxyGenX+ device's oxy-pod applicator. It is also compatible with the HydraScan PRO+ 2026 oxy-pod applicator.
